subject: Serious complaint about service outage — need executive response

body.text:
To whom it may concern,

Our team lost six hours of productive work yesterday due to an unannounced service outage. This is the third incident this quarter. We are an enterprise customer and this level of reliability is unacceptable.

I am escalating this to executive leadership. We need a root-cause analysis, a credit on our account, and a call with your head of customer success by end of week.

Dana
Director of Operations, Enterprise Client
